notes: Single failed pytest functional test in tests/functional/test_truststore.py::test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]. Surface error is `AssertionError: Script returned code: 1` but underlying root cause is GitHub returning 502 Bad Gateway when pip downloads https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip. The test was retried 3 times by pytest-rerunfailures before final fail; flaky_or_transient = true. Source URL: https://github.com/pypa/pip/actions/runs/25304420764/job/74177317281. Imported on 2026-05-06; raw.log normalized from `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` output by stripping the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line.
